label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this square dance problem. So there are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them starts with a partner. The question is about tracking who ends up with whom after a series of partner swaps. First, I need to list the initial pairings. Let me write them down: - Alice is with Lola - Bob is with Izzi - Claire is with Sam - Dave is with Patrick - Eve is with Karl Now, the problem describes several partner switches. Let me go through each step one by one. It's important to track each change carefully to avoid mix-ups. The first switch is Claire and Bob switching partners. So initially, Claire is with Sam and Bob is with Izzi. After they switch, Claire will have Bob's original partner, which is Izzi, and Bob will have Claire's original partner, which is Sam. So after the first switch: - Alice: Lola - Bob: Sam - Claire: Izzi - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Karl Second switch: Claire and Alice switch partners. Currently, Claire is with Izzi and Alice is with Lola. When they switch, Claire takes Alice's partner (Lola), and Alice takes Claire's partner (Izzi). So now: - Alice: Izzi - Bob: Sam - Claire: Lola - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Karl Third switch: Bob and Claire switch partners. At this point, Bob is with Sam and Claire is with Lola. After switching, Bob will take Claire's partner (Lola), and Claire will take Bob's partner (Sam). So now: - Alice: Izzi - Bob: Lola - Claire: Sam - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Karl Fourth switch: Eve and Bob switch partners. Eve is currently with Karl, and Bob is with Lola. After switching, Eve takes Bob's partner (Lola), and Bob takes Eve's partner (Karl). Now: - Alice: Izzi - Bob: Karl - Claire: Sam - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Lola Fifth switch: Dave and Claire switch partners. Dave is with Patrick, Claire is with Sam. After switching, Dave takes Sam, and Claire takes Patrick. So the final pairings are: - Alice: Izzi - Bob: Karl - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Sam - Eve: Lola The question asks: At the end of the dance, Claire is dancing with whom? According to the final pairings, Claire is with Patrick. Checking the options, Patrick is option D. Let me double-check each step to make sure I didn't make a mistake. First switch: Claire (Sam) and Bob (Izzi) swap → Claire: Izzi, Bob: Sam. Correct. Second switch: Claire (Izzi) and Alice (Lola) swap → Claire:
